document.title: POWER HARNESS MI39-01546B Approval Sheet / Request for Approval

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval documentation for POWER HARNESS MI39-01546B, model S4343-AW, including revision history, specifications, inspection report, technical document request/consent, and process quality control plan.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as Samsung and supplier approval evidence for the POWER HARNESS part, including specifications, inspection results, supplier indemnification, and quality control requirements.
keyPoints: POWER HARNESS SEC Code MI39-01546B is associated with Model 2G Detector and vendor SEONGJI.
Request for approval identifies ITEM POWER HARNESS, CODE No. MI39-01546B, MODEL S4343-AW, and Rev. 01.
Revision history states Rev. 01 dated 2019-01-11 was a re-approval for length change from 80 mm to 70 mm.
Part specification inspection report dated 2019-01-11 records Wire Length 70 with tolerance ±5 and PASS result.
The process quality control plan lists Samsung part no. MI39-01546B, manufacture part no. SJ18-06-033, part name HARNESS, and document no. SJKG-PQ-497A-00.
The source states parts should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.

evidence.claim: The approval sheet describes POWER HARNESS with SEC Code MI39-01546B.
evidence.evidenceText: Description POWER HARNESS SEC Code MI39-01546B

evidence.claim: The approval sheet identifies the model as 2G Detector and vendor as SEONGJI.
The approval sheet lists AWG28, 8 pins, and length L70 ± 5 mm as specification deviations.
evidence.evidenceText: AWG AWG28 SPECIFICATION DEVIATIONS Number Of Pins 8 Length L70 ± 5 mm

evidence.claim: The EC history records a 2019-01-11 change approval changing length from 80 mm to 70 mm.
Samsung requested technical document submission from 성지산업 for S4343-AW change approval.
evidence.evidenceText: 삼성전자주식회사(이하 "삼성")는 (성지산업)(이하"협력사")에게 아래와 같은 내용으로 자료 제공을 요청합니다. ◎ 요청 목적 S4343-AW 변경승인 진행

evidence.claim: The requested material was MI39-01546B approval documentation and the delivery method was CPCEX.
evidence.evidenceText: No. 요청 자료명 제공 여부 1 MI39-01546B 승인원 예● ... 2. 인도 방법 : CPCEX

evidence.claim: The request for approval identifies ITEM POWER HARNESS, CODE No. MI39-01546B, MODEL S4343-AW, and Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: REQUEST FOR APPROVAL ITEM POWER HARNESS MI39-01546B CODE No. MODEL SJ18-06-033 S4343-AW Rev. 01

evidence.claim: The request for approval was checked and approved on 2019-01-11.
The supplier states a validity term of at least 15 years from issued date.
evidence.evidenceText: A TERM OF VALIDITY OVER AT LEAST 15-YEARS FROM ISSUED DATE

evidence.claim: SEONG JI INDUSTRIAL provides indemnification for third-party intellectual property claims involving products or components provided by SEONG JI INDUSTRIAL.
evidence.evidenceText: SEONG JI INDUSTRIAL will indemnify, hold harmless, and at Samsung's request, defend Samsung ... arising out of or resulting from any third party claim that any Products and/or Components provided by SEONG JI INDUSTRIAL infringes patent, copyright, trade secret right or other intellectual property right.

evidence.claim: Revision history records initial approval on 2018-10-24 and re-approval on 2019-01-11 for length change from 80 mm to 70 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: 00 2018-10-24 - INITIAL APPROVAL ... 01 2019-01-11 - RE APPROVAL 전장길이 변경 80MM → 70MM

evidence.claim: The part specification inspection report for MI39-01546B and S4343-AW is dated 2019-01-11.
evidence.evidenceText: PART SPECIFICATION INSPECTION REPORT ... APP CODE-NO. MI39-01546B MODEL S4343 AW ... DATE 2019 01 11

evidence.claim: The inspection report records wire length 70 with ±5 tolerance and PASS result.
The process quality control plan identifies SEC Part No. MI39-01546B, Manufacture Part No. SJ18-06-033, Part Name HARNESS, and document no. SJKG-PQ-497A-00.
evidence.evidenceText: SEC Part No, MI39-01546B ... Manufacture Part No, SJ18-06-033 ... Part Name HARNESS ... Document no SJKG-PQ-497A-00

evidence.claim: The process quality control plan category is SOP.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category □ DV, □ PV , □ PR , ■ SOP

evidence.claim: The source specifies that the parts should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: RoHS incoming inspection includes XRF checks with limits for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, and BR.
evidence.evidenceText: Cd（유기물） - ≤50ppm ... Pb（무기물） - ≤700ppm ... Hg（무기물） - ≤700ppm ... Cr6+ - ≤700ppm ... BR（비금속） - ≤300ppm ... 수입검사 RoHS 1-4 XRF

evidence.claim: Finished product inspection includes function inspection, length CTF 70±5 mm, and damage inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: 5 완제품 검사 기능검사 ... 5-2 길이 CTF 70±5mm 승인원 S-4 AQL : 1.0 LOT 출하검사성적서 철자 O 5-3 DAMAGE - 이상없음 작업지도서 전수 LOT 출하검사성적서 VISUAL O

reviewFlags.reason: No government regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; the document appears to be supplier/customer approval documentation rather than an official authority-issued regulatory document.
Multiple revision indicators appear: approval sheet Document Code Revision 00 and request-for-approval Rev. 01; Rev. 01 was selected from the request-for-approval and revision history.
Multiple dates appear, including 2018-10-25, 2019-01-10, and 2019-01-11; 2019-01-11 was selected as the primary approval/re-approval date.
OCR quality is uneven, with duplicated text and malformed date text such as 2019-0111.
